prefs.title: Notification Preferences
prefs.desc: Choose which notifications you want to receive.
prefs.MEMBER_CLUBS_desc: Only from clubs you're a member (or advisor) of.

FOUNDING_MEMBER.name: Founding Member
FOUNDING_MEMBER.hint: Be among a club's first 10 members.

profile.title: My Profile

passwordCard.title: Change Password
passwordCard.description: Set a new password (at least 6 characters).
passwordCard.label: New Password

profile.noClubs: You are not a member of any club yet.

toasts.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

auth.tagline: Discover campus communities, join events, and manage your own club.

login.title: The whole campus in one place.
login.subtitle: METU NCC Community & Event Portal
login.domainError: Only METU email addresses can sign in

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join the METU NCC Community & Event Portal
register.domainError: Only @metu.edu.tr or @ncc.metu.edu.tr email addresses are allowed.
register.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.confirmBody: Activate your account by clicking the confirmation link sent to your email. (Also check your spam folder.)

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sentBody: Check your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link.
forgot.domainError: Only @metu.edu.tr or @ncc.metu.edu.tr email addresses are allowed.
forgot.sendError: Could not send the reset email. Please try again.

reset.title: Set a New Password
reset.subtitle: Create a new password for your account.
reset.invalidBody: Please restart the password reset process.
reset.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
reset.updateError: Could not update password. Please try again.

home.subtitle: Discover active campus clubs and join communities.
home.activeClubsEmptyBody: They'll appear here as new communities are added.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Discover and join upcoming campus events.

ticket.qrHint: Show this QR code at the entrance.

toasts.buyCreated: Your ticket is ready. Your QR code is available.

fair.title: Club Fair
fair.subtitle: Pick your interests, discover clubs that fit, and join with one tap.
fair.noMatch: No clubs match your selected interests.
fair.noCategories: No clubs with categories defined yet.

calendar.title: My Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Your upcoming RSVPs, week by week.
calendar.empty: You have no attendance planned for this week.

clubs.listSubtitle: Search, discover, and become part of communities you're interested in.
clubs.searchPlaceholder: Search by club name or description…
clubs.noDescription: No description has been added for this club yet.
clubs.notFoundBody: The club you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been removed.
clubs.whatsappJoinDesc: Join the group exclusive to club members.
clubs.noMembers: Be the first to join this club!

clubRequest.pageSubtitle: Apply to the school administration to start a new campus community. Once approved, you become the club's advisor.

cta.title: Want to start a community?
cta.body: As an advisor, you can apply to establish a new campus community.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the community's purpose in a few sentences (optional).
form.rationalePlaceholder: Why should this community exist? Provide a rationale to help the school administration decide.

pending.title: Your application is under review
pending.body: Your application has been sent to the school administration. You'll be notified once a decision is made.

changes.title: Changes requested
changes.body: The school administration requested changes to your application. Update the information below according to the note and resubmit.

approved.title: Your application was approved!
approved.body: Congratulations — the “{name}” community has been created and you are its advisor. Head to the club management panel to appoint a president and add events.

rejected.title: Your application was rejected
rejected.body: This application was not approved by the school administration. Review the reason and submit a new application.

documents.title: Documents
documents.emphasizeNote: — you can attach documents supporting your application

toasts.uploadError: Could not upload the document. Please try again.
toasts.saveError: Could not save the document. Please try again.
toasts.deleteError: Could not delete the document. Please try again.

shell.title: {name} · Management
shell.infoDesc: Edit the community's general information and contact channels.
shell.eventsDesc: Create, edit, or delete your club's events.
shell.ticketsDesc: Review receipts and approve or reject them.
shell.membersDesc: Manage members; assign admins or remove them from the club.
shell.announceDesc: Publish an announcement that reaches club members as a notification.

info.ticketSystemDesc: When enabled, this club's events use a free QR attendance pass (check-in tracking).

events.empty: No events yet. Add the first one.
events.dialogCreateDesc: After creation, the event enters the approval flow.
events.deadlineHint: If left empty, sales stay open until the event time.

toasts.capacityInvalid: Capacity must be a positive integer.
toasts.created: Event created and submitted for approval
toasts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the event "{title}"?
toasts.changesNoteRequired: Enter a note for the revision.

events.rejectConfirmBody: "{title}" will be rejected. The president can resubmit after revising. Are you sure?
events.changesPlaceholder: Describe what needs to be fixed…

members.empty: This club has no members yet.

tickets.empty: No attendance passes issued for this club yet.

toasts.uploadError: Could not upload the document. Please try again.
toasts.saveError: Could not save the document. Please try again.
toasts.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete the document "{name}"?
toasts.deleteError: Could not delete the document. Please try again.

announce.title: Send Announcement
announce.desc: Delivered to club members as a notification. Max 3 announcements per hour.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for may have moved, been removed, or never existed.

confirm.removeMemberBody: {name} will be removed from the club. This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteEventBody: "{title}" and all related data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteDocBody: "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
confirm.deletePhotoBody: This photo will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

page.title: Admin Panel
page.subtitle: Super admin · clubs, admins, and advisors

overview.heading: Overview
overview.subtitle: Campus at a glance — what's here, what's waiting.

fairMode.title: Club Fair Mode
fairMode.desc: When on, the home page switches to discovery mode: students pick interests and matching clubs are highlighted. Ideal for registration week.

newClub.title: Add New Club
newClub.subtitle: Admin panel · Create a community
newClub.descPlaceholder: Briefly describe the club's purpose and activities…

assignments.title: Assign Academic Advisor
assignments.desc: School management only assigns advisors. The advisor designates the club president. (Leave empty to remove the advisor.)
assignments.noneAssigned: No club has an advisor assigned yet.

toasts.notSaved: Assignment could not be saved (permission denied). Please try again.

roles.title: Advisor Role
roles.desc: Make a user an advisor or revoke the role. Advisors will be able to apply to open a community even without belonging to a club (permissions come in a later stage).
roles.noCandidates: No user available to make an advisor.

toasts.notSaved: Role could not be saved (permission denied). Please try again.

approvals.queueDesc: Events awaiting school approval. Once approved, they go live for students.
approvals.rejectConfirmBody: "{title}" will be rejected. The president can resubmit after revising. Are you sure?
approvals.changesPlaceholder: Describe what needs to be fixed…
approvals.settingsDesc: When on, events go to the advisor first, then the school. When off, they go directly to school approval.

toasts.changesNoteRequired: Enter a note for the revision.

clubRequests.queueDesc: Community applications opened by advisors. Once approved, a real club is created and the applicant becomes its advisor.
clubRequests.changesPlaceholder: Describe what needs to be revised…
clubRequests.rejectPlaceholder: Write the reason for rejection (shared with the advisor)…
clubRequests.rejectConfirmBody: The "{name}" application will be rejected. The applicant advisor will be notified with the reason.

toasts.changesNoteRequired: Enter a note for the revision.

analytics.heading: Analytics
analytics.growthDesc: New members joining clubs each month.
analytics.growthEmpty: Not enough data for the chart.
analytics.clubsDesc: Member, event, and attendance breakdown per club.

termReport.hint: Pick a date range and generate the report.

toasts.badRange: Start date cannot be after end date.

checkin.title: {name} · Door Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Scan a QR code or find by name to check in.
checkin.cameraHint: Open the camera and scan the attendee's QR code.
checkin.cameraError: Could not start the camera. Grant permission or use name search.
checkin.qrAlignHint: Align the QR code within the frame
checkin.manualHint: Enter the ticket code manually and verify.
checkin.cameraDeniedBody: Grant camera permission, or check in by code or name.

photos.title: Event Snapshots
photos.empty: No snapshots from this event yet.
photos.emptyManager: Upload snapshots from the event (max 10, ~5MB each).

toasts.tooMany: You can upload at most {max} photos.
toasts.tooBig: Each photo must be at most ~5MB.
